'''Kauron''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in [[Kauron system/Legends|Kauron system]] within [[Meram sector/Legends|Meram sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The world was home to the [[Kauronian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and served as a hideout for the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]].
